snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We‚Äôve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here‚Äôs what we created. Aren‚Äôt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let‚Äôs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you‚Äôll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 ‚Äî How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 ‚Äî DIY ring 

2:48 ‚Äî Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 ‚Äî DIY hair comb 

6:53 ‚Äî Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 ‚Äî DIY fake nails

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn‚Äôt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone‚Äôs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ‚Äî and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one‚Äôs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won‚Äôt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 ‚Äî The pacifier hack 

2:42 ‚Äî A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 ‚Äî The getting along/best friends‚Äô shirt 

7:20 ‚Äî Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 ‚Äî Tasty gummy bear lollies

snippet.title: Greseli in Andra Gogan - ESCAPE FROM CHRISTMAS
snippet.description:
Dupa serialul Sirenele, Andra Gogan si Razvan Gogan au trecut mai departe si au facut un film : ESCAPE FROM CHRISTMAS. Pana aici totul e in regula, dar imediat se schimba situatia dupa ce aflati ca intreg filmul e in limba engleza. 

daca vezi asta follow aici : https://www.instagram.com/stefan.shire/

snippet.title: Budinca duo cu ciocolata si mascarpone / Desertul care a innebunit Tiktok-ul | JamilaCuisine
snippet.description:
Daca activati pe TikTok, cu siguranta ati auzit de "sa fac spume daca stiu". O reteta care a fost facuta dintr-o gluma si care a acaparat pe toata lumea. Pentru ca si pe mine m-au provocat foarte multi oameni s-o fac, am venit cu varianta mea imbunatatita. Budinca super fina cu ciocolata si mascarpone, cu un gust minunat si o aroma extraordinara.

https://jamilacuisine.ro/budinca-duo-cu-ciocolata-si-mascarpone-reteta-video/

Pentru ca si pe mine m-au provocat foarte multi oameni s-o fac, am venit cu varianta mea imbunatatita. Budinca super fina cu ciocolata si mascarpone, cu un gust minunat si o aroma extraordinara.

Lyrics:
I‚Äôm on an island
Even when you‚Äôre close
Can‚Äôt take the silence
I‚Äôd rather be alone
I think it‚Äôs pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It‚Äôs time I wave goodbye from the window
Let‚Äôs end this like we should and say we‚Äôre good

We‚Äôre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let‚Äôs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you‚Äôre with somebody else
As long as you swear you won‚Äôt be pissed when I do it myself 
Let‚Äôs end it like we should and say we‚Äôre good

No need to hide it 
Go get what you want
This won‚Äôt be a burden if we both don‚Äôt hold a grudge
I think it‚Äôs pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It‚Äôs time I wave goodbye from the window
Let‚Äôs end this like we should and say we‚Äôre good

We‚Äôre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let‚Äôs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you‚Äôre with somebody else
As long as you swear you won‚Äôt be pissed when I do it myself 
Let‚Äôs end it like we should and say we‚Äôre good

Now you‚Äôre holding this against me
Like I knew you would
I tried my best to make this easy
So don‚Äôt give me that look just say we‚Äôre good

We‚Äôre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let‚Äôs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you‚Äôre with somebody else
As long as you swear you won‚Äôt be pissed when I do it myself 
Let‚Äôs end it like we should and say we‚Äôre good

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.description:
Paste cu branza feta si rosii cherry,  reteta care golit supermarketurile din Finlanda. Cel mai simplu si mai usor sos pentru paste, preparat doar in cuptor, fara prea multe ingrediente. E atat de gustos si de aromat incat va asigur ca-l veti face mereu.

snippet.title: 'I‚Äôm not a cat': lawyer gets stuck on Zoom kitten filter during court case
snippet.description:
A lawyer showed up to virtual court in the 394th district of Texas with a kitten filter turned on, the cat moving its lips and eyes, as Rod Ponton said he and his assistant were attempting to remove the filter during the court case.

The judge later posted the snipped and wrote: 'If a child used your computer before you join a virtual hearing, check the Zoom video options to be sure filters are off. This kitten just made a formal announcement on a case in the 394th.'

Giro la festa, conosco tutto il mondo
Eeney meeney miney moo

A te ti piace, a me me piace
Tutta in pelle, Donatella Versace
Gucci, Prada, l√Ý, Lamborghini fra
Forme come Elettra, me fanno pens√Ý
Switch vibes come ad Amsterdam
Swiss watch sulla sua mano, man
Da Siracusa a Lugano, senza passaporto
Si muove come se mi volesse morto, per√≤

Sto con la mia banda in giro
Frega niente me la giro
Anche la sua testa gira
Cosa facciamo col cuore
Quando non c‚Äô√® pi√π l‚Äôamore
Vola con me verso il sole
Yeee, blekete bleke

When Toni (Vanessa Morgan) catches him up on what‚Äôs been going on, Archie reaches out to the rest of the gang to return home.
